trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Geocode Cache - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Geocode Cache - Field Longitude - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Geocode Cache - Field Quality - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Geocode Cache - Field Reverse Address - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Geocode Cache - Field Usage Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: OSS version only supports Any, Customer, and Vendor anchor entities.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Anchor Entity - Method OnValidate - NamedType UnsupportedAnchorErr
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Category - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Code - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Confidence Override - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Default Radius (km) - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Description - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Enabled - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Entity Type - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: OSS version only supports Customer and Vendor entity types.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Entity Type - Method OnValidate - NamedType UnsupportedEntityTypeErr
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Intent - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Last Modified DateTime - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Output Schema - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Scenario Code - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Scope - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: OSS version only supports Self, Selection, and Region scopes.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Scope - Method OnValidate - NamedType UnsupportedScopeErr

Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Target Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: OSS version only supports Any, Same as Anchor, Customer, and Vendor target entities.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Target Entity - Method OnValidate - NamedType UnsupportedTargetErr
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Template Text - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Title - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Tools Json - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Variables - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Prompt Template - Field Version - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Distance (km) - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Entry No. - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Item Id - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Longitude - Property Caption

Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Payload - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Result Item - Field Score - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Property Caption
%1 = Configuration field name
Table GeoAI Setup - Method ValidateConfiguration - NamedType MissingConfigErr
Table GeoAI Setup - Field AI Provider - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Automatically clear geocode and mark for re-geocoding when address fields change on entities.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Auto Geocode on Address Change - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Auto Geocode on Address Change - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Azure Maps Key - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Cache Enabled - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Cache TTL Hours - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Geographic search radius in kilometers for candidate selection. Candidates beyond this distance from the anchor are excluded.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Candidate Search Radius - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Candidate Search Radius - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Default precision for geohash encoding (1-12 characters). Higher values = smaller area, more precise. Typical: 4 (~39km), 6 (~1.2km), 8 (~38m).
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Default Geohash Precision - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Default Geohash Precision - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Enable Telemetry - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Restrict candidates to the same country as the anchor entity.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Enforce Same Country - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Enforce Same Country - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of days to retain geocode cache entries before automatic purge.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Geocode Cache Days - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Geocode Cache Days - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Google Maps API Key - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Local AI Gateway URL - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Map Provider - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Web interface for viewing single location on map (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps for Google or https://www.bing.com/maps for Azure/Bing)
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Map View URL - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Map View URL - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Web interface for multi-point directions (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/dir/)
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Maps Directions URL - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Maps Directions URL - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Maps Endpoint URL - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Maps Endpoint URL - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of candidate entities to send to AI for similarity analysis. Higher values increase accuracy but cost. Hard cap: 200.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Candidates Sent To AI - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Candidates Sent To AI - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Maximum tokens allowed for input (prompt + context).
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Input Tokens - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Input Tokens - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of retry attempts for failed AI calls.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Retry Attempts - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Max Retry Attempts - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Microsoft Foundry API Version - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Microsoft Foundry Endpoint - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Microsoft Foundry Key - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Microsoft Foundry Model - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Primary Key - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Level of PII redaction before sending data to AI. Light: mask emails/phones. Strict: aggressive masking.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Redaction Level - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Redaction Level - Property Caption
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Redaction Level - Property OptionCaption

trans-unit.source: Maximum time to wait for AI response in milliseconds.
trans-unit.note: Table GeoAI Setup - Field Timeout (ms) - Property ToolTip
Table GeoAI Setup - Field Timeout (ms) - Property Caption
%1 = Record ID
Codeunit Customer Geo Provider - Method GetLocationContext - NamedType RecordNotFoundErr

trans-unit.source: This entity has geocoding status with Low Confidence. Coordinates may not be accurate.\\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Customer Geo Provider - Method ValidateGeocodingStatus - NamedType LowConfidenceQst

trans-unit.source: Geocode cache purge completed. %1 entries deleted.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Number of entries
Codeunit GeoAI Cache Purge - Method OnRun - NamedType PurgeCompletedLbl

trans-unit.source: Entity type %1 is not supported for GeoAI operations in the OSS version. Only Customer and Vendor are supported.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Entity Type
Codeunit GeoAI Entity Factory - Method GetEntityProvider - NamedType UnsupportedEntityErr

trans-unit.source: No coordinates available. Please geocode the address first.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit GeoAI Map URL Formatter - Method OpenMapForCoordinates - NamedType NoCoordinatesMsg
%1 = Template code
Codeunit GeoAI Prompt Engine - Method BuildPrompt - NamedType TemplateNotFoundErr
%1 = Template code
Codeunit GeoAI Prompt Engine - Method BuildPrompt - NamedType TemplateNotEnabledErr

trans-unit.source: No Business Central entity data was provided in this request. Please inform the user that they must select an entity type or provide entity information to receive Business Central data-based answers.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit GeoAI Response Constraints - Method BuildEntityGroundedSystemPrompt - NamedType NoDataFallbackMsg

trans-unit.source: To receive Business Central entity-based answers, please select an Entity Type from the Context & Filters section or provide an entity number/name.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit GeoAI Response Constraints - Method GetEntityRequiredFallbackMessage - NamedType ChatFallbackMsg

trans-unit.source: Unable to answer. No Business Central entity data was provided. This feature requires entity context to operate.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit GeoAI Response Constraints - Method GetEntityRequiredFallbackMessage - NamedType PromptFallbackMsg

trans-unit.source: GeoAI capability is not enabled or Azure OpenAI authorization is missing. Validate GeoAI setup and Copilot capability activation.
trans-unit.note: Shown when IsInitialized returns false.
Codeunit GeoAI Service (AOAI) - NamedType CapabilityNotInitializedErr

trans-unit.source: AOAI request failed after %1 attempts. Status: %2. %3
trans-unit.note: %1 = attempts, %2 = status, %3 = error text
Codeunit GeoAI Service (AOAI) - NamedType FailureDetailLbl
%1 = Status code, %2 = Error text
Codeunit GeoAI Service (AOAI) - NamedType FailureStatusLbl
%1 = status code, %2 = error text surfaced to the user
Codeunit GeoAI Service (AOAI) - NamedType FailureUserMessageLbl

trans-unit.source: Status 0 indicates Business Central blocked the request before reaching Azure OpenAI. Validate Copilot capability enrollment, GeoAI setup, and AOAI credentials.
trans-unit.note: Shown when AOAI status code is 0 and no detailed error is provided.
Codeunit GeoAI Service (AOAI) - NamedType StatusZeroHintLbl

trans-unit.source: Entity type is not supported for geocoding in the OSS version. Only Customer and Vendor are supported.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit GeoLocation Mgmt - Method GeocodeRecord - NamedType UnsupportedEntityErr
%1 = Record ID
Codeunit Vendor Geo Provider - Method GetLocationContext - NamedType RecordNotFoundErr

trans-unit.source: This entity has geocoding status with Low Confidence. Coordinates may not be accurate.\\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Vendor Geo Provider - Method ValidateGeocodingStatus - NamedType LowConfidenceQst
Page GeoAI Prompt - Property Caption
%1 = Provider error text shown to the user.
Page GeoAI Prompt - NamedType AiRequestFailedLbl

trans-unit.source: Please enter a prompt or select one from the guide.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - NamedType EmptyPromptErr

trans-unit.source: No templates match this action for %1.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Anchor entity caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - NamedType NoTemplatesForActionLbl
Page GeoAI Prompt - NamedType UnknownErrorDetailLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType CustomerLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType VendorLbl
%1 = Code, %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType LocationLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType ContactLbl
%1 = No., %2 = First Name, %3 = Last Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType EmployeeLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType ResourceLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Description
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType JobLbl
%1 = No., %2 = Name
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method BuildEntityContextText - NamedType BankAccountLbl
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method RunGenerate - NamedType GenOkMsg

trans-unit.source: This %1 is not geocoded yet. Please run "Geocode Address" first before using GeoAI features.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Entity type
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method ValidateEntityGeocoding - NamedType NotGeocodedErr

trans-unit.source: No geocoded %1 found within %2 km of this entity. Consider increasing the search radius.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Entity type, %2 = Radius
Page GeoAI Prompt - Method ValidateNearbyCandidates - NamedType NoCandidatesErr
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control PromptGuide - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control ResultActions - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Displays errors returned by the AI provider.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control ResultError - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control ResultSurface - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Answer-focused view of the latest GeoAI response.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control AnswerText - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control ContextInfo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the entity this prompt is about.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control EntityContext - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control EntityContext - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of results to return.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control MaxResults - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control MaxResults - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The radius in kilometers for proximity searches.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control RadiusKm - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Control RadiusKm - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Describe what you need, or pick a prompt from the guide below...
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Control InputPrompt - Property InstructionalText
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action AnalyticsScenarios - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Identify clusters and patterns for anchored records.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ClusterAnalysis - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ClusterAnalysis - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Evaluate heatmaps and coverage for anchored records.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action CoverageAnalysis - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action CoverageAnalysis - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ExpansionOpportunities - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ExpansionOpportunities - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ProximityScenarios - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Find nearby records relative to the current entity.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action FindNearby - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action FindNearby - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Find the nearest relevant records based on anchor context.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action FindNearest - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action FindNearest - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Search within a broader region around the current entity.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action SearchRegion - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action SearchRegion - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action RoutingScenarios - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action PlanRoute - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action PlanRoute - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Schedule deliveries or visits based on proximity and time windows.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ScheduleVisits - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action ScheduleVisits - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action TerritoryPlanning - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt - Action TerritoryPlanning - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Cancel and close the dialog without saving.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action Cancel - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Generate AI response based on your prompt.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action Generate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Accept the result and close the dialog.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action OK - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Regenerate the AI response with the same prompt.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt - Action Regenerate - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Control Scenario Code - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Control Scenario Code - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Control Title - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Apply this template to the prompt
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Action UseTemplate - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Guide - Action UseTemplate - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Configuration - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default search radius in kilometers.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Default Radius (km) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this template is enabled.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Enabled - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when the template was last modified.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Last Modified DateTime - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the maximum number of results to return.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Max Results - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the version of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Version - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique code for the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the entity type this template applies to. OSS supports Customer and Vendor only.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Entity Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the scenario code for this template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Scenario Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the title of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Title - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Taxonomy - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies which entity provides the context anchor for the template. OSS supports Any, Customer, and Vendor only.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Anchor Entity - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Anchor Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the taxonomy category that best describes the template's outcome.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Category - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the intended action or analysis performed by the template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Intent - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the template operates on the record itself, its relations, or the wider network. OSS supports Self, Selection, and Region only.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Scope - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the primary entity this template targets when generating results. OSS supports Any, Same as Anchor, Customer, and Vendor only.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Target Entity - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Control Target Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens an editor for the template text.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Action EditTemplateText - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Action EditTemplateText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens a read-only viewer for the system text.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Action ViewSystemText - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Template - Action ViewSystemText - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies which entity provides context anchoring for the template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Anchor Entity - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Anchor Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the taxonomy category that best describes this template.'s outcome.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Category - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique code for the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this template is enabled.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Enabled - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the entity type this template applies to.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Entity Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the intended action or analysis performed by the template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Intent - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when the template was last modified.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Last Modified DateTime - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the scenario classification for this template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Scenario Code - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Scenario Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the scope of data the template expects (self, related, or network).
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Scope - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the primary entity this template targets when generating output.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Target Entity - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Target Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the title of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Title - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the version of the prompt template.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Prompt Templates - Control Version - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Result Items - Method RunExportPrompt - NamedType NoDataToExportMsg

trans-unit.source: No location data available to display on the map.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Method RunOpenMapViewer - NamedType NoDataMsg

trans-unit.source: You have %1 items to display. Opening all items on the map may be slow or limited by the map provider.\\ \Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Number of items
Page GeoAI Result Items - Method RunOpenMapViewer - NamedType TooManyItemsMsg

trans-unit.source: You have %1 items to display. Most map providers limit the number of waypoints to 25-50.\\ \Options:\- Click OK to open the first 25 items\- Click Cancel and use "Export Result Items" to create a KML file for advanced mapping tools
trans-unit.note: %1 = Number of items
Page GeoAI Result Items - Method RunOpenMapViewer - NamedType VeryLargeSetMsg
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control DistanceKm - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control DistanceKm - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the estimated time of arrival in minutes.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Control ETAMinutes - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control ETAMinutes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique identifier of the result item.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Control ItemId - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control ItemId - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control Latitude - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Control Longitude - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the result item.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Control Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the relevance score of the result.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Control Score - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Export the latest AI Prompt response to a file.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Action ExportPrompt - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Action ExportPrompt - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View the AI results on an interactive map.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Result Items - Action OpenMap - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Result Items - Action OpenMap - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Setup - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Setup - Control AIProvider - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the AI service provider for GeoAI operations.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control AI Provider - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the URL for local AI gateway.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Local AI Gateway URL - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry API Version - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry API Version - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the endpoint URL for Microsoft Foundry.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry Endpoint - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the API key for Microsoft Foundry.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry Key - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Name of the deployed model to use (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini).
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry Model - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Microsoft Foundry Model - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Setup - Control CachePerformance - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Automatically clear geocode and mark for re-geocoding when address fields change on entities.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Auto Geocode on Address Change - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether result caching is enabled.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Cache Enabled - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cache time-to-live in hours.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Cache TTL Hours - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Default precision for geohash spatial indexing (1-12). Higher = more precise/smaller area. Typical: 6 (~1.2km).
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Default Geohash Precision - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Number of days to retain geocode cache entries before automatic purge.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Geocode Cache Days - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Maximum tokens allowed for input (prompt + context).
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Max Input Tokens - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Number of retry attempts for failed AI calls.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Max Retry Attempts - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Maximum time to wait for AI response in milliseconds.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Timeout (ms) - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control CandidateSelection - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Geographic search radius in kilometers for candidate selection. Candidates beyond this distance from the anchor are excluded.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Candidate Search Radius - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Restrict candidates to the same country as the anchor entity.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Enforce Same Country - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of candidate entities to send to AI for similarity analysis. Higher values increase accuracy but cost. Hard cap: 200.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Max Candidates Sent To AI - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control DataSecurity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Level of PII redaction before sending data to AI. Light: mask emails/phones. Strict: aggressive masking.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Redaction Level - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control MapProvider - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the subscription key for Azure Maps services.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Azure Maps Key - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the API key for Google Maps services.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Google Maps API Key - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the map and geocoding service provider.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Map Provider - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Web interface URL for viewing single location on map. Example: https://www.google.com/maps for Google or https://www.bing.com/maps for Azure/Bing
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Map View URL - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Map View URL - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Web interface URL for displaying multi-point directions/routes. Example: https://www.google.com/maps/dir/
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Maps Directions URL - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Maps Directions URL - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: API endpoint for geocoding (converting addresses to coordinates). Example: https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/geocode/json
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Maps Endpoint URL - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Maps Endpoint URL - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Setup - Control Telemetry - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether telemetry logging is enabled.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Control Enable Telemetry - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Creates the 18 standard GeoAI prompt templates (9 per entity × 2 entities: Customer, Vendor). Safe to run multiple times - only creates missing templates.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action InitializeTemplates - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Action InitializeTemplates - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This will initialize 36 standard prompt templates for Customer and Vendor entities. Continue?
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action InitializeTemplates - Method OnAction - NamedType ConfirmQst

trans-unit.source: Prompt templates initialized successfully. Templates are now available in the Ask GeoAI dialog.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action InitializeTemplates - Method OnAction - NamedType SuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Manually purge geocode cache entries older than the configured retention period.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action PurgeGeocodeCache - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Action PurgeGeocodeCache - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Geocode cache purge completed. %1 entries deleted.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Number of entries
Page GeoAI Setup - Action PurgeGeocodeCache - Method OnAction - NamedType SuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Tests the connection to configured AI services.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action TestConnection - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Action TestConnection - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: AI connection OK (%1). Latency: %2 ms. Preview: %3
trans-unit.note: %1 = provider, %2 = milliseconds, %3 = first chars of response
Page GeoAI Setup - Action TestConnection - Method OnAction - NamedType SuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Please select an AI Provider to test.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action TestConnection - Method OnAction - NamedType ProviderMsg

trans-unit.source: Connection reached but response could not be parsed.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action TestConnection - Method OnAction - NamedType ParseFailedMsg

trans-unit.source: Validates that all required configuration settings are present.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action ValidateConfiguration - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Setup - Action ValidateConfiguration - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Configuration is valid and ready to use.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Setup - Action ValidateConfiguration - Method OnAction - NamedType ConfigValidMsg
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Filters - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control ScopeFilterValue - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control ScopeFilterValue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Quickly narrow templates by target entity.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control TargetFilterValue - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control TargetFilterValue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Short explanation of what the template does.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Scope of data the template expects (self, selection, company, region).
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Scope - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Scope - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Primary entity this template targets when generating output.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Target Entity - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Target Entity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Template title that will populate the AI prompt.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Title - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Version - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Control Version - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Remove the quick filter for scope.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action ClearScopeFilter - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action ClearScopeFilter - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Remove the quick filter for target entity.
trans-unit.note: Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action ClearTargetFilter - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action ClearTargetFilter - Property Caption
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action UseTemplate - Property ToolTip
Page GeoAI Template Picker - Action UseTemplate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The text content to view or edit.

Page GeoAI Text Editor - Control TextContent - Property Caption
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action GeoAIActions - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens GeoAI prompt copilot for this customer.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action AskGeoAI - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action AskGeoAI - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Geocodes the customer address to get coordinates.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action GeocodeAddress - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action GeocodeAddress - Property Caption
%1 = Confidence score
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action GeocodeAddress - Method OnAction - NamedType SuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Geocoding failed. Please check the address.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action GeocodeAddress - Method OnAction - NamedType FailedMsg

trans-unit.source: Opens the customer location in an external mapping service.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action ViewOnMap - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Action ViewOnMap - Property Caption
PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the confidence score of the geocoding result.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI Geocode Confidence - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the status of the geocoding operation.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI Geocode Status Field - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when the address was last geocoded.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI Last Geocode DateTime - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the latitude coordinate of the customer address.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI Latitude - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the longitude coordinate of the customer address.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer Card GeoAI - Control GeoAI Longitude - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Opens GeoAI prompt copilot for the selected customer.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer List GeoAI - Action AskGeoAI - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Customer List GeoAI - Action AskGeoAI - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Geocodes addresses for all selected customers.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer List GeoAI - Action GeocodeSelected - Property ToolTip

%1 = Success count, %2 = Fail count
PageExtension Customer List GeoAI - Action GeocodeSelected - Method OnAction - NamedType ResultMsg

trans-unit.source: Opens the first selected customer location in an external mapping service.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Customer List GeoAI - Action ViewOnMap - Property ToolTip
